2026-0187
2026-03-03PMODepartment of Citizenship and Immigration ActAppointment of the Deputy Minister of Citizenship and ImmigrationAppointment of Ted Gallivan of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Citizenship and Immigration, to be styled Deputy Minister of Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Citizenship and Immigration Act
subject: Appointment of the Deputy Minister of Citizenship and Immigration
precis: Appointment of Ted Gallivan of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Citizenship and Immigration, to be styled Deputy Minister of Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
